---
title: "CP-W06-2 - Group 2 Collaboration"
author: "Leeann Lewis-Waddell, Brian Vuong, Ron Stephen Sabilla"
date: 'Leeann Lewis-Waddell'
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    number-sections: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-fold: false
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute: 
  freeze: auto
  warning: false
---
